page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool designed to jointly detect CNVs from WGS data in parent-offspring trios.  It models read depth signal with the negative binomial regression to accommodate over-dispersion and considered GC content and mappability bias.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool designed to jointly detect CNVs from WGS data in parent-offspring trios.  It models read depth signal with the negative binomial regression to accommodate over-dispersion and considered GC content and mappability bias.
